positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a cosmic nebula flowing through a celestial silhouette of a meditating figure. The nebula should exhibit vibrant gradients of deep indigo, electric cyan, and magenta, contrasting sharply against the deep void black background. The overall style is geometric modern art combined with fine linework, designed for screen printing on apparel. The composition is centered, with the figure occupying the lower half and the cosmic flow sweeping dramatically across the upper half. Use bold, thick outlines and negative space heavily. Highly detailed, vector-like precision, perfect contrast, suitable for print. Full color, high contrast, symmetry, ethereal, abstract.
